name: HydraLiquid – Vitamin C Brightening Solution
shortDescription: Farmona Professional vitamin C brightening solution, 500 ml. Fades pigmentation spots, brighter skin tone, with niacinamide and lactic acid. Approx. 50 treatments.
description:
The Farmona Professional Brightening Solution was specifically created for treating hyperpigmentation, post-acne marks, freckles, and uneven skin tone.

The high active ingredient formula targets skin discolorations with vitamin C, niacinamide, and lactic acid, while supporting skin renewal and photoprotective functions.

500 ml size, sufficient for approximately 50 treatments. For professional use only.

faq.question: How many treatments does a 500 ml bottle last?
faq.answer: A 500 ml bottle is sufficient for approximately 50 treatments, which means extremely economical usage.

faq.question: Which devices can this solution be used with?
faq.answer: The solution is a professional liquid designed specifically for hydro-abrasion and cavitation peeling treatments. It is excellent for cleansing, brightening, and skin tone-evening protocols.

faq.question: What skin type is the vitamin C solution recommended for?
faq.answer: Primarily recommended for pigmented, uneven-toned, dull skin and hyperpigmentation treatment. Vitamin C fades spots, niacinamide inhibits melanin synthesis.

whatsIncluded: 1 pc Farmona Professional HydraLiquid Vitamin C brightening solution (500 ml)
